name: Uninsured employer hurt me in North Salt Lake, what now?
description: Sue employer directly for full damages[1].

mainEntity.name: Uninsured employer hurt me in North Salt Lake, what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Sue employer directly for full damages[1].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Sue directly—Utah exception pierces exclusive remedy.** No comp shield[1]. **Key factors:** Prove no coverage, full damages available. **Practical guidance:** Verify insurance status, file tort suit timely. Lawyer essential. **Unlocks pain/suffering awards.**
